key.name: display-mode
key.description: Controls whether FluxBar shows total speed or download and upload speeds separately.

key.name: speed-format
key.description: Controls whether FluxBar shows standard or compact speed text.

key.name: unit-mode
key.description: Controls whether FluxBar shows speeds in bytes or bits.

key.name: network-source
key.description: Controls which network interfaces FluxBar uses for speed calculations.

key.name: hide-when-idle
key.description: Controls whether FluxBar hides the panel label when there is no active network traffic.

key.name: label-color
key.description: Optional hexadecimal color for the FluxBar panel label.

key.name: text-weight
key.description: Controls whether the FluxBar panel label uses normal or bold text.

key.name: update-interval-ms
key.description: Controls how often FluxBar refreshes network speed, in milliseconds.
